description: Create a Service Operations Desk (SOD): the post-sales execution arm for RMAs, shipping, returns, evals, ticket closure templates, and part collection so support engineers can focus on problem solving and customer resolution.

examples.context: Support guys shipping parts and handling returns. Needed a group for that work.
examples.resolution: SOD as traditional RMA/execution arm. Support back on problems. Both lanes clearer.
No ship without complete handoff. Reject rate visible then dropped.

examples.context: Org started tossing random tasks at SOD.
examples.resolution: Scope lock republished. SOD stayed logistics-focused.
